message:
✨ Make dynamic cards re-addable from Add Card modal (#331)

Dynamic cards created via the Card Factory now appear in the Browse tab
under a "Custom Cards" category. If a user removes a dynamic card from
their dashboard, they can re-add it without losing the card definition.

- Add reactive dynamic card listing in AddCardModal (updates when cards
  are created/deleted via onRegistryChange subscription)
- Encode dynamic card IDs in currentCardTypes so the "(Added)" badge
  works correctly for individual dynamic cards
- Update Dashboard.tsx and CustomDashboard.tsx to use dynamic_card::id
  encoding for existingCardTypes

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
